fields.Name: ORCID
fields.Description: ORCID Public API v3.0 read-only connector. Resolves researcher iD universes via per-connection Lucene search and/or explicit iD lists, then fetches the record and activity sections. Pull-only / read-public; OAuth2 client-credentials.

Configuration.BaseURLNote: Active host is chosen per-connection from CompanyIntegration.Configuration (sandbox vs production). NOT a baked constant.
Configuration.APIVersioningNote: Version is encoded in the URL path as /v3.0/. Current stable version is v3.0.

PaginationDefaults.description: Search endpoints use start/rows offset pagination. Max rows per page: 1000. Max total search results ~10k. Per-iD record/activity endpoints return all items in one response.
PaginationDefaults.searchPaginationNote: No cursor — connector re-resolves the search each run and deduplicates via content-hash idempotency.

Configuration.IncrementalSyncDescription: Activity items carry last-modified-date (IncrementalWatermarkField). Connector tracks last-seen modified-date per object type as watermark. Search-scoped iD universe has no cursor — re-resolve each run, dedup via content-hash idempotency.

activityItems.note: All activity section items use put-code as PK.

record.note: ORCID iD is the PK for record/person IO.

Configuration.TokenRefreshNote: ORCID client-credentials /read-public tokens expire in ~20 years. Re-acquisition on 401 is the safe strategy.
Configuration.WebhooksNote: Webhooks are Premium Member API only. Not available on Public API.
Configuration.BulkOperationsNote: GET /{iD}/works/{pc1},{pc2},...,{pcN} fetches up to 100 works by put-code in one request. Read-only bulk fetch for works IO only.

ErrorResponseShape.description: Defined in error-3.0.xsd. Top-level element: error:error.
ErrorResponseShape.overLimitBehavior: HTTP 503 when burst (40 req/sec) exceeded. HTTP 429/block when daily quota (100k reads/day per client ID) exceeded.
ErrorResponseShape.note: Supports content negotiation: application/json or application/xml.

WriteCapability.Note: ORCID Public API is read-only. All write operations require the partner-gated Member API.

Configuration.ConcurrencyControlNote: Public API is read-only. No write operations, so concurrency control is not applicable.
Configuration.DeleteSemanticsNote: Connector is pull-only. Deleted source items disappear from feed; detected by absence after full search re-resolve.
Configuration.DefaultConflictResolutionRationale: Pull-only connector. Source is always authoritative. ConcurrencyControl=none means MostRecent not applicable.
Configuration.CustomObjectMarkerNote: ORCID uses a fixed XSD-defined schema. No custom object/field patterns in Public API.
Configuration.NotEnumerableReason: ORCID has no list-all-records endpoint. iD universe resolved per-connection via CompanyIntegration.Configuration.

ScopeConfigSchema.description: Per-connection CompanyIntegration.Configuration knobs. At least one of searchQuery or orcidIds must be set.

searchQuery.description: Lucene query string for GET /search or /expanded-search.

useSandbox.description: If true, use SandboxBaseURL and SandboxTokenURL. Default: false.

ScopeConfigSchema.required: at least one of searchQuery or orcidIds

Configuration.OutOfScopeReason: In scope = the ORCID Public API v3.0 READ surface (record/person + activity sections), reachable self-serve with a read-public OAuth2 client. The partner-gated MEMBER API write/update surface is real but requires partner approval and is not the reachable/useful surface for this read-public connector; recorded out-of-scope-with-reason so a future Member-API build can expand without re-discovering.

fields.Name: record
fields.Description: Full ORCID record for a researcher: orcid-identifier, preferences, history, person section (name/biography/emails/urls/keywords/external-ids/addresses), and activities-summary. Root IO; iD universe resolved at runtime via CompanyIntegration.Configuration (searchQuery / orcidIds). PK = ORCID iD.

fields.Name: orcid-id
fields.Description: The ORCID iD (16-char path, e.g. 0000-0002-1825-0097). Primary key of the record/person IO; the natural identity used to address GET /{iD}/record. (common-3.0.xsd orcid-identifier / orcid-id, orcid-path pattern)

fields.Name: orcid-identifier
fields.Description: Full ORCID identifier object: uri, path, host. (record-3.0.xsd orcid-identifier; common-3.0.xsd orcid-id)

fields.Name: preferences
fields.Description: Record preferences (locale). (record-3.0.xsd ref preferences:preferences)

fields.Name: history
fields.Description: Record history: creation-method, completion-date, submission-date, last-modified-date, claimed, verified-email, verified-primary-email, deactivation-date. (history-3.0.xsd history)

fields.Name: submission-date
fields.Description: The date-time the ORCID record was first created. (history-3.0.xsd submission-date, xs:dateTime)

fields.Name: last-modified-date
fields.Description: The date-time the record was last modified. Incremental watermark field for the record IO. (history-3.0.xsd / person-3.0.xsd last-modified-date, xs:dateTime)

fields.Name: verified-email
fields.Description: True if the user has a verified email. (history-3.0.xsd verified-email, xs:boolean)

fields.Name: claimed
fields.Description: True if the record has been claimed by the researcher. (history-3.0.xsd claimed, xs:boolean)

fields.Name: person
fields.Description: Person section: name, biography, other-names, researcher-urls, emails, addresses, keywords, external-identifiers. Nested per non-enumerable architecture (person sub-structures are fields within the record IO). (person-3.0.xsd person)

fields.Name: given-names
fields.Description: Given (first) name(s) of the researcher. (personal-details-3.0.xsd name/given-names, common:string-150)

fields.Name: family-name
fields.Description: Family (last) name of the researcher (optional — some cultures use only given names). (personal-details-3.0.xsd name/family-name, common:string-150)

fields.Name: credit-name
fields.Description: Full name as the researcher prefers it displayed. (personal-details-3.0.xsd credit-name, common:string-150)

fields.Name: biography
fields.Description: The researcher biography content. (personal-details-3.0.xsd biography/content, common:non-empty-string)

fields.Name: emails
fields.Description: Emails collection. (person-3.0.xsd ref email:emails; email-3.0.xsd)

fields.Name: researcher-urls
fields.Description: Researcher URLs collection. (person-3.0.xsd ref researcher-url:researcher-urls)

fields.Name: keywords
fields.Description: Keywords collection. (person-3.0.xsd ref keyword:keywords)

fields.Name: other-names
fields.Description: Other names collection. (person-3.0.xsd ref other-name:other-names)

fields.Name: addresses
fields.Description: Addresses (country) collection. (person-3.0.xsd ref address:addresses)

fields.Name: external-identifiers
fields.Description: Person external identifiers collection. (person-3.0.xsd ref external-identifier:external-identifiers)

fields.Name: works
fields.Description: works activity section for a researcher, fetched via GET /{ORCID-iD}/works. Child of the record IO; put-code is the integer PK. last-modified-date is the incremental watermark.

fields.Name: orcid-id
fields.Description: The ORCID iD of the researcher whose record this item belongs to. Foreign key to the record IO. Proven by the parametric child path GET /{ORCID-iD}/<section> (read-data tutorial) — the {ORCID-iD} segment IS the FK.

fields.Name: put-code
fields.Description: The put-code is the integer primary key for the activity item. Present when reading; used to address a single item via GET /{iD}/<section>/{put-code}. (common-3.0.xsd: element-summary @put-code; put-code simpleType base xs:integer)

fields.Name: path
fields.Description: Element path /{orcid}/{activity-name}/{put-code}, present only when reading. (common-3.0.xsd element-summary @path, element-path simpleType)

fields.Name: visibility
fields.Description: Visibility level: private | limited | public | registered-only. Public API returns only public items. (common-3.0.xsd element-summary @visibility, visibility simpleType enumeration)

fields.Name: display-index
fields.Description: Display ordering index for the item. (common-3.0.xsd element-summary @display-index)

fields.Name: created-date
fields.Description: The date-time when the item was created. (common-3.0.xsd created-date element, xs:dateTime)

fields.Name: last-modified-date
fields.Description: The date-time when the item was last modified. Used as the incremental sync watermark field. (common-3.0.xsd last-modified-date element, xs:dateTime)

fields.Name: source
fields.Description: Attribution: the client application or ORCID user that created the item (source-client-id or source-orcid). Nested object. (common-3.0.xsd source-type)

fields.Name: title
fields.Description: work field 'title' (type work:work-title, minOccurs=1). Source: work-3.0.xsd.

fields.Name: journal-title
fields.Description: work field 'journal-title' (type common:string-1000, minOccurs=0). Source: work-3.0.xsd.

fields.Name: short-description
fields.Description: work field 'short-description' (type common:short-description, minOccurs=0). Source: work-3.0.xsd.

fields.Name: citation
fields.Description: work field 'citation' (type work:citation, minOccurs=0). Source: work-3.0.xsd.

fields.Name: type
fields.Description: work field 'type' (type work:work-type, minOccurs=1). Source: work-3.0.xsd.

fields.Name: publication-date
fields.Description: work field 'publication-date' (type common:publication-date, minOccurs=0). Source: work-3.0.xsd.

fields.Name: external-ids
fields.Description: work field 'external-ids' (type common:external-ids, minOccurs=0). Source: work-3.0.xsd.

fields.Name: url
fields.Description: work field 'url' (type common:url, minOccurs=0). Source: work-3.0.xsd.

fields.Name: contributors
fields.Description: work field 'contributors' (type work:work-contributors, minOccurs=0). Source: work-3.0.xsd.

fields.Name: language-code
fields.Description: work field 'language-code' (type common:language-code, minOccurs=0). Source: work-3.0.xsd.

fields.Name: country
fields.Description: work field 'country' (type common:country, minOccurs=0). Source: work-3.0.xsd.

fields.Name: employments
fields.Description: employments activity section for a researcher, fetched via GET /{ORCID-iD}/employments. Child of the record IO; put-code is the integer PK. last-modified-date is the incremental watermark.

fields.Name: orcid-id
fields.Description: The ORCID iD of the researcher whose record this item belongs to. Foreign key to the record IO. Proven by the parametric child path GET /{ORCID-iD}/<section> (read-data tutorial) — the {ORCID-iD} segment IS the FK.

fields.Name: put-code
fields.Description: The put-code is the integer primary key for the activity item. Present when reading; used to address a single item via GET /{iD}/<section>/{put-code}. (common-3.0.xsd: element-summary @put-code; put-code simpleType base xs:integer)

fields.Name: path
fields.Description: Element path /{orcid}/{activity-name}/{put-code}, present only when reading. (common-3.0.xsd element-summary @path, element-path simpleType)

fields.Name: visibility
fields.Description: Visibility level: private | limited | public | registered-only. Public API returns only public items. (common-3.0.xsd element-summary @visibility, visibility simpleType enumeration)

fields.Name: display-index
fields.Description: Display ordering index for the item. (common-3.0.xsd element-summary @display-index)

fields.Name: created-date
fields.Description: The date-time when the item was created. (common-3.0.xsd created-date element, xs:dateTime)

fields.Name: last-modified-date
fields.Description: The date-time when the item was last modified. Used as the incremental sync watermark field. (common-3.0.xsd last-modified-date element, xs:dateTime)

fields.Name: source
fields.Description: Attribution: the client application or ORCID user that created the item (source-client-id or source-orcid). Nested object. (common-3.0.xsd source-type)

fields.Name: department-name
fields.Description: Department within the organization. (common-3.0.xsd affiliation department-name, long-text)

fields.Name: role-title
fields.Description: Role or title held at the organization. (common-3.0.xsd affiliation role-title, long-text)

fields.Name: start-date
fields.Description: Fuzzy start date (year + optional month/day). (common-3.0.xsd start-date, fuzzy-date)

fields.Name: end-date
fields.Description: Fuzzy end date (year + optional month/day). (common-3.0.xsd end-date, fuzzy-date)

fields.Name: organization
fields.Description: Organization reference: name, address, disambiguated-org-id (ROR/GRID/Ringgold). Required. (common-3.0.xsd organization, minOccurs=1)

fields.Name: url
fields.Description: A URL associated with the affiliation. (common-3.0.xsd affiliation url)

fields.Name: external-ids
fields.Description: External identifiers for the affiliation (type+value+relationship). (common-3.0.xsd external-ids)
